title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. lithophilon
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lithophilon is a rare and lesser-known species of plant within the dandelion family, known as Hieracium, characterized by its dark green leaves and yellowish-white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which provide several health benefits, including antioxidant and antiseptic properties, and it may also help to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lithophilon is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as creams and salves, to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
